context.projectOverview: agent-bober medical knowledge template — FINAL sprint of the medical-ingest spec. Add a Zod-validated personalization profile (age/sex/conditions/medications/supplements/allergies/goals) persisted as a SOPS-encrypted <vaultDir>/profile.yaml behind an INJECTABLE cipher seam (encrypt/decrypt, default = sops age shell-out via execa). Tests inject a reversible fake cipher (no real sops binary). When the cipher signals sops unavailable, read/write REFUSE and write NO plaintext PHI. Adds `bober medical profile show|set`.

completedSprints.title: lab-note
completedSprints.summary: src/medical/lab-note.ts hand-rolled frontmatter helper — reuse the YAML-emit approach for the profile if it serializes plain objects, else a minimal YAML emit is acceptable. No YAML dep is vendored.

completedSprints.title: import-labs CLI
completedSprints.summary: runImportLabs extracted-core + injected-deps + nested-subcommand pattern in src/cli/commands/medical.ts — MIRROR this for runProfileShow/runProfileSet.

completedSprints.summary: runSupplementAdd/List + nested `supplements` subtree under `medical`. Mirror the same nested-subtree registration for `profile show|set`.

relevantFiles: src/cli/commands/medical.ts (runImportLabs/runSupplement* extracted-core + injected-deps + nested subtree registration; .action sets process.exitCode and returns on error, never throws)
